narrative: Strait of Hormuz closure and US-Iran peace uncertainty drive a geopolitical risk premium as WTI crude firmed 2% — gold lower -1.13% near $4,198; equities +1.08%; DXY -0.00%; VIX 16.8. USD/JPY holds at 161.57 as BoJ Deputy Governor Himino warns of inflation overshoot risks, though a 265bp Fed-BoJ OIS carry sustains the pair's bid. GBP/USD at 1.3220 faces political uncertainty following reports of PM Starmer's planned departure. Watch Canadian CPI and global Flash PMIs on Tuesday.
